620 MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Access - Midline (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient had midline IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
621 CENTRL_ADMSN_CD CENTRL_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Access - Central (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient had central IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
